title: Museum & Learning Center Visits - FEDERAL RESERVE BANK of NEW YORK
gist: This is a NY Fed visitor-information page about booking school-group visits to the Museum and Learning Center and gold vault — purely administrative logistics (hours, IDs, capacity). It contains no economic or market analysis; no investable signal.

insights.claim: The NY Fed page on Museum & Learning Center visits is logistical (school-group booking, hours, ID requirements, gold-vault custody as an educational topic) and carries no economic, monetary-policy, or market content.
